name: Chutney Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-cup measure, bring 1/2 cup water to a boil uncovered on high heat.
2. Add dried apple and let stand for 5 minutes.
3. Drain excess liquid from the pot.
4. Place chicken drumsticks in a shallow baking dish and pour 1/4 cup water over them.
5. Cover with vented clear plastic wrap and bring to a boil covered on high heat for 5-6 minutes, rotating the dish a quarter-turn every minute.
6. Drain excess liquid from the pot.
7. For the tomato sauce, combine tomato sauce/chopped onions, raisins, cornstarch, orange peel, ground cloves, bottled hot pepper sauce, and drained apple in a 4-cup measure.
8. Bring to a boil uncovered on high heat for 2.5-3.5 minutes, stirring every minute until thickened and bubbly.
9. Spoon the sauce over the chicken drumsticks.
10. Serve with hot rice if desired.
